# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.

Prevent missing vulnerability scan.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test

    - name: Build artifacts
      run: npm run build

    - name: Scan for vulnerabilities
      uses: SonarSource/sonarcloud-github-action@master
      with:
        sonarOrganization: your-organization
        sonarProjectKey: your-project-key
        sonarLogin: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}

    - name: Deploy to production
      run: |
        # Add deployment commands here
        echo "Deploying to production..."
